title: SoItsTotems
description: By adding your own skin to the texture pack, the totem of undying will update into a custom model but with your skin!
body:
![Totem Being Popped](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oCQgA0PL/images/e8cc571cf35d48eeb21002297995e544fd4f9a77.png)

For more images and demonstrations, head to the gallery

Description

This texture pack features a custom model for the Totem of Undying that transforms it into a miniature character. When you replace the totem's texture with any Minecraft skin, the totem will display as a small version of that skin.! You can replace the texture with any Minecraft skin at all, and it will map different pixels to the totem model texture.

How to Use

  1. Install the texture pack and put it in your resourcepacks folder
  2. Download your skin from a website like namemc.com
  3. Rename the skin png to totem_skin.png
  4. Open the resource pack and go to assets/minecraft/textures
  5. Replace the file in there with the one you downloaded
  6. Make sure to press F3+T ingame just to make sure it works

Support

If you want to suggest anything, report a bug, or vote on future packs, then join my discord and you can message me in there. I will usually respond very quickly.

## [Check out my other mods here!](https://modrinth.com/user/soitsdragon)
